Off Calendar Jun-14-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Vicki Gross. (212)

Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-03-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 to put Settlement on the record.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Marta Guzman, Esq., specially appeared for Plaintiff: FUND RECOVERY SERVICES
Dennis Birkhimer, Esq., for Defendants: Cars Dawydiak, Inc. and Walter Dawydiak, also present.
Plaintiff's witness: Gary E. Looney also present in court
Terms read into the record by defendant's counsel as follows:
Defendants to sign promisory note in favor of plaintiff for $20,000.00. Defendant to pay $500.00/mo. for the first 12 months, remaining balance to be paid by installment of $750.00/mo. thereafter after fully paid with no interest.
Plaintiff's counsel to prepare promissory note and to dismiss case within 45 days. Parties agreed to terms in open court, the court deemed matter settled and trial date vacated. Court ordered Case assigned to Dismissal calendar per CCP 225 on May, 3, 2005 at 10:00 AM, Dept. #212.
